titleStmt.title: SII 40.327: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 327. (A.R. No. B. 375 of 1933.) Peddakomarla, Jammalamadugu Taluk, Cuddapah District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a tier of the Chennakēśava temple.
This is dated Virōdhikṛit, Śrāvaṇa, ba. 8, Friday.

Records the gift of the vipravinōdi-vartana made by some members of the Vipravinōdi community for the benefit of the god Perumāḷ of the village Pedakomerla on the occasion of Śrījayanti, on the north side of the river Pinākinī in the Gaṇḍikōṭa-sīma, attached to the Udayagirirājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu Agunēṭi virōdhikṛta saṁvatsara śrāvaṇa ba 8 śu śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara vīrapratāpa sadāśivadēva mahārāyalu vidyānagaramaṁdu ratnasiṁhāsanārūḍuḍai pṛthivi sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu Udayagiriki cellē gaṁḍikōṭa sīma
lō pinākinadiki Uttarabhāgamāru pedakomerlla perumāḷlaku vinōdulu kāśyapagōtra Āpastaṁbasūtra Atharvaṇa śākhādhyāyulaina mallapautṛlaina vallabhaya putrulaina parvatayapeda Anaṁtaya nallārayya mūrtayya cina Anaṁtayyagārunu bācaya pautṛlaina
dēvaya tiruvaṭivallabhaya vīru mōdalaina vipravinōdulu śāsanakramamu pedakomera grāmananu ma vipravinōdulaku mahājanulu yiccevartana vipravinōdula kulavāriki puṇyaṁgānu tathātithi śrī jayaṁti puṇyakālamaṁdu dhāravosi yistimi yī dharmmānaku yē vipravinōdulu tappinānu tallitaṁḍrādula gōbrahmaṇi vāraṇāśilō vadhiṁcina pāpāna bōvuvāru
ṁccivāru tappinavāru
Digital edition of SII 40.327 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
